free_text: Radionuclide accumulation for photo- and  electron
disintegration of nuclei in the A near 90 region.
The radionuclide yields were investigated  bombarding
Y,  Zr,  Nb  and  Mo   by  beams  of  electrons  and
analysis  of  the  obtained data was performed.  The
agreement between experimental data and  theoretical
